title: All Ore Beacon
description: Just a Datapack that allow you to make beacon with all minerals!
body:
Did you ever found it frustrating that you can't use the beautiful blue lapis or your oxidize copper for your beacon? Fear not, I added the possibility to make beacon out of all ores!

Features:
- All oxidation of copper
- All waxed of copper
- Amethyst
- Quartz
- Coal
- Redstone
- Lapis
